pdp.ing_title: A Formula Built for Real, Gentle Results
pdp.ing_lead: Every box of 3DWhiteningStrips is designed to deliver professional whitening at home — safely and comfortably.
pdp.faq_a1: Yes — our enamel-safe strips deliver whitening gel directly to your teeth to break down stains, with a visibly whiter smile after a single 7-day treatment.
pdp.faq_q2: Are they safe for sensitive teeth?
pdp.faq_a2: Yes. Our balanced, enamel-safe formula is designed to minimize sensitivity. If you have dental concerns, review our Product Safety page or consult your dentist.
pdp.faq_a3: Free worldwide shipping on every order, typically arriving within 6–10 days.
